title: Yale Murine TMC - H&E staining  following Phenocycler-Fusion Imaging
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"eo16o","text":"Flow cell removal after Phenocycler-Fusion imaging and following H\u0026E staining steps from Yale Pathology Tissue Services (YPTS).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Immerse slides in graded ethanol to xylene.
Add coverslip with resin mounting medium.
Immerse slides to xylene for 10 mins.
Separate flow cell from the slide using a razorblades.
Store in storage buffer until H&E staining.
creator: Jungmin Nam
